key_metrics.asteroid_impact_probability: Estimated chance of a civilization-threatening asteroid impact in the next century is less than 1%
key_metrics.supervolcano_activity: No active supervolcanoes are currently showing signs of imminent eruption
key_metrics.astrophysical_event_frequency: Cosmic events like gamma-ray bursts or nearby supernovae are extremely rare within human timescales

main_risks: Asteroid impact with a diameter over 1 km
Supervolcano eruption with global climate effects
trends: Improved asteroid detection and deflection technologies
Stable geological activity in supervolcanic regions
No significant increase in astrophysical event detection
